channel.title: How to deploy on Azure Linux WebApp with Azure DevOps?
channel.description:
There is nowhere on the internet a guide on how to deploy on Azure WebApp.
pm2, node, npm run, npx. None works. It looks like the localhost:3000 is listening but the website can't be accessed.
Can somebody provide a full guide of how to run frontity on azure?

item.title: How to deploy on Azure Linux WebApp with Azure DevOps?
item.dc:creator: nickelnext
item.description:
There is nowhere on the internet a guide on how to deploy on Azure WebApp.

pm2, node, npm run, npx. None works.
It looks like the localhost:3000 is listening but the website can’t be accessed.

Can somebody provide a full guide of how to run frontity on azure?

Read full topic
item.source: How to deploy on Azure Linux WebApp with Azure DevOps?
